pull_request.title: chore(deps): bump openrewrite.version from 8.78.0 to 8.78.2
pull_request.body:
Bumps `openrewrite.version` from 8.78.0 to 8.78.2. Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.78.0 to 8.78.2
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.78.2

What's Changed

  • Surface actual parse error in MergeYaml via Validated API by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6818
  • JS: Populate declaring type on standalone function declarations by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7222
  • Fix RPC recipes errors being swallowed when in batch by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7226
  • JavaScript: upgrade-dependency-version recipe to fail when npm install fails by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7227
  • Fix duplicate gradlePluginPortal() in settings.gradle.kts by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#7230
  • Go: add GoTemplate, GoPattern, MethodMatcher, TypeUtils, and rename module by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7235
  • Gracefully handle malformed Maven version strings by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7234
  • Suppress vulnerabilities by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7236
  • Fix StackOverflow in RELEASE_PATTERN by reducing regex branch nodes by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7231

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.78.1...v8.78.2

8.78.1

What's Changed

  • Fix NumberFormatException in version comparison for versions with 6+ numeric parts by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7207
  • Scala parser: enum support, wildcard import preservation, intersection types by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7203
  • Fix build cache determinism for reproducible builds by @​ribafish in openrewrite/rewrite#7173
  • Fix build cache determinism for rewrite-go goBuild task by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7214
  • C#: Add MSBuildProject/DotNetProject RPC codecs and Parse handler by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7156
  • Add GitIgnore utility for gitignored-and-untracked checks by @​pdelagrave in openrewrite/rewrite#7215
  • Allow null Properties to skip YAML placeholder resolution by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7200
  • C#: Exclude git-ignored files from SolutionParser results by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7181
  • Support changing properties in Maven profiles by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#7031
  • Add SyncGradleExtPropertiesWithBom recipe by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6958
  • C#: Add documentation comment LST infrastructure by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7015
  • Skip redundant property override in child when parent declares same dependency by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6955
  • Add recipes which sort dependency declarations in Gradle and Maven by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#7217
  • Fix AddProperty skipping property when child POM has relativePath by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6943
  • Add ParseError support to rewrite-go parser and RPC by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7218
  • Handle directory-style relativePath in getParentWithinProject by @​kmccarp in openrewrite/rewrite#7223
  • Python: Populate declaring type on function declarations by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7221
  • Rewrite encoding detection as inverted UTF-8 validator by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#7213
  • Fix parsing of dockerfiles which contain $ and escaped " characters by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#7224
  • Replace ThreadLocal with cursor-based accumulator in DeclarativeRecipe by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7225
  • Use JavaTemplate.apply() static method by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7219

New Contributors

  • @​ribafish made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite#7173

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.78.0...v8.78.1

Commits
  • 03fe804 Fix StackOverflow in RELEASE_PATTERN by reducing regex branch nodes (#7231)
  • 8efd89b Suppress vulnerabilities (#7236)
  • 54e3e24 Gracefully handle malformed Maven version strings (#7234)
  • f136dfb Go: add GoTemplate, GoPattern, MethodMatcher, TypeUtils, and rename module (#...
  • 18e5bb7 Fix duplicate gradlePluginPortal() in settings.gradle.kts (#7230)
  • 5b212d9 Fail recipe when npm install fails (#7227)
  • f9234ea Fix RPC recipes errors being swallowed when in batch (#7226)
  • a311899 JS: Populate declaring type on standalone function declarations (#7222)
  • c6071dd [Auto] EOL Docker images as of 2026-04-01T1025
  • a770d1b Surface actual parse error in MergeYaml via Validated API (#6818)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.78.0 to 8.78.2
- [Release notes](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/releases)
